default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, progress, and upcoming projects.](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content focus: Expense category pages (50 published, 44 pending) + upcoming Brex page updates](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Strong performance: 53 published articles showing positive growth trends](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [New priorities: Complete expense categories, refresh credit card content, prepare for vendor network project](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Future projects: Exploring hotel/restaurant content leveraging Ramp's transaction data + external sources](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Roles

  - [New Ramp team members introduced:](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
      - [Matt: Owns editorial function, potential Air Ops user for refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
      - [Victoria: Owns vendor network and accounting pillars](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [GrowthX team structure clarified:](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
      - [Bisera: Leads content initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
      - [Jimmy & Kyle: SEO strategy, backlinks, technical SEO](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

### Content Progress and Performance

  - [53 articles published, showing strong performance growth](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [10 expense category pages published yesterday](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [44 articles ready but not yet live (to be staged by VA)](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Per diem pages also performing well](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

### Workflow and Tools

  - [Airtable used for content tracking and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [Google Doc shared for meeting notes and updates](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [VA hired to handle publishing tasks](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Upcoming Content Priorities

1.  Complete expense category pages (50 initial, then remainder)
2.  Start Brex page updates next week
3.  Credit card content refreshes (Ali provided feedback on no annual fee card)
4.  Vendor network project (spec coming next Wednesday)

### Future Projects and Data Access

  - [Luke working on providing access to Ramp's transactions table (pending security review)](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Potential Q1 projects:](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Top alternatives content (to be reviewed)](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Hotels and restaurants content leveraging Ramp's merchant/travel data](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore external data sources for added value (e.g., crime data for tourism)](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to complete and publish remaining expense category pages](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Bisera to incorporate Ali's feedback on credit card content and submit for review](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Luke & Victoria to finalize vendor network project spec by next Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Jimmy to discuss potential custom API workflows with CTO for future hotel/restaurant content](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Luke to continue process for providing GrowthX access to Ramp's transaction data](https://fathom.video/share/zTNGvyHNrnopDeqdzsMYsbsVCEhsEcuB?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

action_items.description: Add Matt and Victoria to Airtable for content tracking
Publish remaining expense category articles via VA
Update first 5-10 Brex articles, send to Ali for review
Prep full vendor network spec w/ Victoria by next Wed
Initiate process for GrowthX access to transactions table
